fields.name: display title^#If this is left blank, this family will be treated as a list of top-level items (items w/o a family, e.g. visor tints).
commendation id^#This must match one of the commendation names.
minimum level#This field is ignored if 'type' is set to 'aggregator'.
item_category#From the global multiplayer object list.
object_name^#This must match one of the global objects.
object variant index#e.g. used for weapon skins
object_name^#This must match an item in the custom app globals.
ordnance_name^#This must match one of the global ordnance objects.
model_region#See player customization globals, linked from globals.globals.
model_customization_selection_name^#This must match one of the selections in the model customization globals (within the selected region).
non_model_region#See player customization globals, linked from globals.globals.
non_model_customization_selection_name^#This must match one of the selections in the model customization globals (within the selected region).
display title^#If this is left blank, this family will be treated as a list of top-level items (items w/o a family, e.g. visor tints).
display title^#If this is left blank, this family will be treated as a list of top-level items (items w/o a family, e.g. visor tints).

options: auto buy#this item is automatically given to the player when they meet the conditions
default#this item will appear as 'worn' when the player isn't wearing any item (for 'default' items)
doesn't count toward percent complete#this item will NOT count toward an overall completion value
doesn't count toward new items#this item is never 'new'
lsp_authoritative#cannot be purchased locally, only LSP can set
